    • TransitionProvider

    Class TransitionProvider

    Central registry and factory for transition events, hooks, and transition instances.

    Implements

    • TransitionService
    Index

    Properties

    $get $inject

    Methods

    create getHooks on onBefore onCreate onEnter onError onExit onFinish onRetain onStart onSuccess

    Constructors

    constructor

    • new TransitionProvider(
          globals: RouterProvider,
          viewService: ViewService,
          $exceptionHandler: ExceptionHandlerProvider,
      ): TransitionProvider

      • globals: RouterProvider
      • viewService: ViewService
      • $exceptionHandler: ExceptionHandlerProvider

      Returns TransitionProvider

    Properties

    $get

    $get: readonly [
        "$state",
        "$url",
        "$stateRegistry",
        "$view",
        (
            stateService: StateProvider,
            urlService: UrlService,
            stateRegistry: StateRegistryProvider,
            viewService: ViewService,
        ) => TransitionProvider,
    ] = ...

    Wires runtime services into the transition service and registers the hooks that depend on state/url/view services.

    Static$inject

    $inject: readonly [
        "$routerProvider",
        "$viewProvider",
        "$exceptionHandlerProvider",
    ] = ...

    Methods

    create

    • create(fromPath: PathNode[], targetState: TargetState): Transition

      Creates a new transition from the current path to a target state.

      Parameters

      • fromPath: PathNode[]
      • targetState: TargetState

      Returns Transition

      Implementation of TransitionService.create

    • getHooks(hookName: string): RegisteredHook[]

      Returns hooks registered for a specific transition event name.

      • hookName: string

      Returns RegisteredHook[]

          eventName: string,
